package rulecoverage

func PositivePgxCollectrowsUnboundedMaterialization() string {
    ruleID := "pgx_collectrows_unbounded_materialization"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "pgx.CollectRows used on request paths without a visible LIMIT in the query."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
